title: hieracium lachenalii subsp. lachenalii
intro: Hieracium lachenalii subsp. lachenalii, a subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family Asteraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Hieracium lachenalii subsp. lachenalii include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal benefits.
